ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "Bad request"}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "Resource not found"}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "Method not allowed"}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "Not acceptable"}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "Unsupported media type"}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "Not Implemented"}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "Resource not found"}

set-variable.value: #[attributes.uriParams.accountNumber as String]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json var inp = [] --- inp<<payload reduce ((item, accumulator) -> item)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "FAILED", "statusCode": 404, "message": "Account doesn't exist please try with correct account number", "accountNumber": vars.accountNumber }

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

set-variable.value: #[attributes.uriParams.accountNumber as String]

when.expression: #[sizeOf(payload) == 1 and payload.FULLNAME[0] == vars.inputpayload.FullName and payload.MOBILENUMBER[0] == vars.inputpayload.mobileNumber and payload.ADDRESS[0] == vars.inputpayload.address]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "Status": "Failed", "StatusCode": 200, message: "Requested data is already updated with the same details", accountNumber: vars.accountNumber, account_data: { "fullname": payload.FULLNAME[0], "mobilenumber": payload.MOBILENUMBER[0], "address": payload.ADDRESS[0], "accountStatus": payload.STATUS[0], "accountCreatedOn": payload.CREATED_AT[0] } }

snowflake:update.doc:name: Update requested data
snowflake:update.snowflake:sql: UPDATE bank_customer_data SET FULLNAME =:FullName, ADDRESS =:address, MOBILENUMBER =:mobileNumber WHERE ACCOUNTNUMBER =:accountNumber
snowflake:update.snowflake:input-parameters: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { FullName: vars.inputpayload.FullName, address: vars.inputpayload.address, mobileNumber: vars.inputpayload.mobileNumber, accountNumber: vars.accountNumber }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var inp = [] --- inp<<payload reduce ((item, accumulator) -> item)]

ee:transform.doc:name: account does not exist in database

logger.doc:name: he customer account deatils does not existed in DB
logger.message: ----------------------------The customer account deatils does not existed in DB--------------------------

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

ee:transform.doc:name: account does not exist in database

logger.doc:name: he customer account deatils does not existed in DB
logger.message: ----------------------------The customer account deatils does not existed in DB--------------------------

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

set-variable.value: #[attributes.uriParams.accountNumber as String]

ee:transform.doc:name: account does not exist in database

logger.doc:name: The customer account deatils does not existed in DB
logger.message: ----------------------------The customer account deatils does not existed in DB--------------------------

snowflake:select.doc:name: retrive transaction data
snowflake:select.snowflake:sql: SELECT c.ACCOUNTNUMBER AS ACCOUNTNUMBER, t.value['transactionType']::STRING AS TRANSACTIONTYPE, t.value['amount']::NUMBER AS AMOUNT, t.value['balanceAfterTransaction']::NUMBER AS BALANCE, t.value['timestamp']::STRING AS TIMESTAMP FROM MYDATABASE.PUBLIC.BANK_CUSTOMER_DATA c, LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => c.TRANSACTIONS) t WHERE c.ACCOUNTNUMBER = :accountNumber;

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { payloadType: typeOf(payload), payload: payload }

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "SUCCESS", statusCode: 200, transactions: vars.db map (row) -> { accountNumber: row.ACCOUNTNUMBER, transactionType: row.TRANSACTIONTYPE, amount: row.AMOUNT, balance: row.BALANCE, timestamp: row.TIMESTAMP } }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailbody]

email:send.doc:name: email Send
email:send.subject: #["Please find your Transactions in this month -" ++ vars.bankName]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- vars."output"
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "Failed", message: "We couldn’t find an account with the given account number. Please check and try again.", accountNumber: vars.accountNumber }

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { adharNumber: attributes.queryParams.adharNumber, bankName: attributes.queryParams.bankName }]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json var inp = [] --- inp<<payload reduce ((item, accumulator) -> item)]

when.expression: #[vars.inputPayload.address == null or vars.inputPayload.mobileNumber == null or vars.inputPayload.FullName == null or vars.inputPayload.dateOfBirth == null or vars.inputPayload.email == null]

snowflake:select.doc:name: verify account
snowflake:select.snowflake:sql: SELECT ACCOUNTNUMBER FROM bank_customer_data WHERE email = :email OR dateOfBirth = :dateOfBirth OR adharNumber = :adharNumber;

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload[0]

logger.doc:name: The customer account is already existed in DB
logger.message: ----------------------------The customer account is already existed in DB--------------------------#[payload]

snowflake:insert.doc:name: Insert data
snowflake:insert.snowflake:input-parameters: #[{ "FullName": vars.inputPayload.FullName, "dateOfBirth": vars.inputPayload.dateOfBirth, "mobileNumber": vars.inputPayload.mobileNumber, "email": vars.inputPayload.email, "address": vars.inputPayload.address, "adharNumber": vars.inputAttributes.adharNumber, "accountNumber": vars.accountNumber, "bankName": vars.inputAttributes.bankName }]

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

set-variable.value: #[payload[0].BALANCE default 0]
#["TXN-" ++ (now() as String {format: "yyyyMMddHHmmss"})]

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "Success", "statusCode": 200, "message": "Amount deposited successfully done for the Account Number - " ++ vars.accountNumber as String, "data": { "transactionId": "TXN-" ++ (now() as String {format: "yyyyMMddHHmmss"}), "currency": "INR", "balance": vars.balance, 'type': 'Deposit', "timestamp": now() }
}

set-variable.value: #[(payload.amount default 0) as Number]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json var inp = [] --- inp<<payload reduce ((item, accumulator) -> item)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "Account is identified but Amount deposited failed for Account Number - " ++ vars.inputpayload.ACCOUNTNUMBER[0] as String }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var accNo = vars.inputpayload.ACCOUNTNUMBER[0] as String var bank = vars.inputpayload.BANKNAME[0] as String --- { errorCode: "ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND", message: "Your account number " ++ accNo ++ " does not exist in bank " ++ bank ++ ". Please try with a different account number." }

set-variable.value: #[payload[0].BALANCE default 0]
#["TXN-" ++ (now() as String {format: "yyyyMMddHHmmss"})]

parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

email:send.doc:name: Email Send deposit amount
email:send.subject: #["Amount Withdraw is successful Today! " ++ vars.BANKNAME as String]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "Success", statusCode: 200, message: "Amount debited successfully for Account Number - " ++ (vars.accountNumber as String), data: { transactionId: "TXN-" ++ (now() as String {format: "yyyyMMddHHmmss"}), currency: "INR", withdrawTime: now(), 'type': "Withdraw", amount: vars.amount, balance: vars.BALANCE } }

set-variable.value: #[(payload.amount default 0) as Number]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json var inp = [] --- inp<<payload reduce ((item, accumulator) -> item)]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/java
var currentBalance = (vars.balance default 0) as Number var withdrawAmount = (vars.amount default 0) as Number var remainingBalance = currentBalance - withdrawAmount
--- { balance: remainingBalance, amount: withdrawAmount, accountNumber: vars.accountNumber }]

snowflake:update.doc:name: Update account data after money withdraw
snowflake:update.snowflake:sql: UPDATE MYDATABASE.PUBLIC.BANK_CUSTOMER_DATA SET BALANCE = :balance, TRANSACTIONS = ARRAY_APPEND( COALESCE(TRANSACTIONS, ARRAY_CONSTRUCT()), OBJECT_CONSTRUCT( 'accountNumber', ACCOUNTNUMBER, 'transactionType', 'WITHDRAW', 'amount', :amount, 'balanceAfterTransaction', :balance, 'timestamp', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() ) ) WHERE ACCOUNTNUMBER = :accountNumber;
snowflake:update.snowflake:input-parameters: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { balance: vars.leftBalance.balance as String, amount: vars.amount, accountNumber: vars.accountNumber, }]

choice.doc:name: checking the withdraw amount updated or not

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { amount: vars.amount, timestamp: payload.CREATED_AT as String default "", status: "Account is identified but Amount withdraw failed for Account Number - " ++ vars.inputpayload.ACCOUNTNUMBER[0] as String }

set-variable.value: #[(payload.mobileNumber default payload.data.from default '') as String]
#[lower(trim(payload.message default payload.data.body default ''))]

snowflake:select.doc:name: verify customer detsiles exist or not

ee:transform.doc:name: transform db array payload into json

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload

logger.doc:name: he customer account deatils does not existed in Database
logger.message: ----------------------------The customer account deatils does not existed in Database--------------------------

snowflake:select.doc:name: retrive account deatiles by mobilenumber
snowflake:select.snowflake:sql: SELECT FULLNAME, ACCOUNTNUMBER, STATUS, BALANCE, EMAIL, BANKNAME, ADDRESS, ADHARNUMBER, CREATED_AT, MOBILENUMBER FROM BANK_CUSTOMER_DATA WHERE MOBILENUMBER = :mobileNumber;

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
var customer = payload[0] default {} var acc = (customer.ACCOUNTNUMBER default "") as String var adhar = (customer.ADHARNUMBER default "") as String
--- { mobileNumber: customer.MOBILENUMBER default "", customerName: customer.FULLNAME default "Customer",
accountNumber: if(sizeOf(acc) >= 4) "XXXXXX" ++ acc[-4 to -1] else "Not Available",
accountType: customer.STATUS default "N/A",
balance: customer.BALANCE default 0,
email: customer.EMAIL default "N/A",
bankName: customer.BANKNAME default "Real Bank",
address: customer.ADDRESS default "N/A",
adharNumber: if(sizeOf(adhar) >= 4) "XXXXXXXX" ++ adhar[-4 to -1] else "Not Available",
createdAt: customer.CREATED_AT default "" }

http:request.doc:name: Request send to whatsapp assistant
http:request.http:body:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/x-www-form-urlencoded --- { token: p("ultramsg.token"), to: "91" ++ vars.mobileNumber, body: "🏦 Real Bank

" ++ "Dear " ++ payload.customerName ++ "

" ++ "🏦 Bank : " ++ payload.bankName ++ "
" ++ "👤 Customer : " ++ payload.customerName ++ "
" ++ "📱 Mobile : " ++ payload.mobileNumber ++ "
" ++ "💳 Account : " ++ payload.accountNumber ++ "
" ++ "📊 Status : " ++ payload.accountType ++ "
" ++ "💰 Balance : ₹" ++ (payload.balance as String) ++ "
" ++ "📧 Email : " ++ payload.email ++ "
" ++ "🏠 Address : " ++ payload.address ++ "
" ++ "🆔 Aadhaar : " ++ payload.adharNumber ++ "
" ++ "📅 Created : " ++ (payload.createdAt as String) ++ "

" ++ "Thank you for banking with Real Bank." }]

logger.doc:name: he customer account deatils does not existed in Database
logger.message: ----------------------------The customer account deatils does not existed in Database--------------------------

snowflake:select.doc:name: retrive transacctions data by mobilenumber

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
var rows = payload default [] var customer = rows[0] default {}
var account = (customer.ACCOUNTNUMBER default "") as String var adhar = (customer.ADHARNUMBER default "") as String var mobile = (customer.MOBILENUMBER default "") as String var email = (customer.EMAIL default "") as String
--- { mobileNumber: mobile, customerName: customer.FULLNAME default "Customer",
accountNumber: if (sizeOf(account) >= 4) "XXXXXX" ++ account[-4 to -1] else "Not Available",
accountStatus: customer.STATUS default "N/A", currentBalance: customer.BALANCE default 0,
email: if (email contains "@") email[0 to 1] ++ "******@" ++ ((email splitBy "@")[1]) else "Not Available",
bankName: customer.BANKNAME default "Real Bank",
address: if ((customer.ADDRESS default "") != "") "************" else "Not Available",
adharNumber: if (sizeOf(adhar) >= 4) "XXXXXXXX" ++ adhar[-4 to -1] else "Not Available",
createdAt: customer.CREATED_AT default "",
transactions: rows map (item) -> { transactionType: item.TRANSACTIONTYPE, amount: item.AMOUNT, balanceAfterTransaction: item.BALANCEAFTERTRANSACTION, timestamp: item.TIMESTAMP } }

http:request.doc:name: Request send to whatsapp assistant
http:request.http:body:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/x-www-form-urlencoded
var txns = if (isEmpty(payload.transactions default [])) "No recent transactions." else (payload.transactions map (t,index) -> (index + 1) as String ++ ". " ++ (t.transactionType default "") ++ " | ₹" ++ (t.amount as String) ++ " | Balance: ₹" ++ (t.balanceAfterTransaction as String) ++ " | " ++ (t.timestamp as String) ) joinBy "
"
--- { token: p("ultramsg.token"),
to: "91" ++ (payload.mobileNumber as String),
body: "🏦 *REAL BANK*

" ++ "👤 Customer: " ++ payload.customerName ++ "
" ++ "💳 Account: " ++ payload.accountNumber ++ "
" ++ "📱 *Mobile:* " ++ (payload.mobileNumber default "N/A") ++ "
" ++ "📌 *Status:* " ++ (payload.accountStatus default "N/A") ++ "
" ++ "📧 *Email:* " ++ (payload.email default "N/A") ++ "
" ++ "🏠 *Address:* " ++ (payload.address default "N/A") ++ "
" ++ "📅 *Account Created:* " ++ ((payload.createdAt default "") as String) ++ "

" ++ "🏦 *Bank:* " ++ (payload.bankName default "Real Bank") ++ "
" ++
"💰 Balance: ₹" ++ (payload.currentBalance as String) ++ "

" ++ "📜 Last Transactions
" ++ txns }]

logger.doc:name: he customer account deatils does not existed in Database
logger.message: ----------------------------The customer account deatils does not existed in Database--------------------------

logger.doc:name: Before database inside balance choice router

snowflake:select.doc:name: retrive the account data by the user mobile number
snowflake:select.snowflake:sql: SELECT FULLNAME, ACCOUNTNUMBER, BALANCE, BANKNAME, MOBILENUMBER FROM BANK_CUSTOMER_DATA WHERE MOBILENUMBER = :mobileNumber;

logger.doc:name: after retrive data the output of data base is array transform into json

http:request.doc:name: Request send to whatsapp assistant
http:request.http:body:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/x-www-form-urlencoded
// Safely extract mobile number from array or fallback to "N/A" var mobileNumber = if (payload.mobileNumber is Array) (payload.mobileNumber[0] as String) default "N/A" else (payload.mobileNumber as String) default "N/A"
// Use default values for potentially null fields var customerName = payload.FULLNAME[0] default "N/A" var accountNumber = payload.ACCOUNTNUMBER[0] default "N/A" var bankName = payload.BANKNAME[0] default "N/A" var balance = payload.BALANCE[0] default "N/A" --- { token: p("ultramsg.token"), to: "91" ++ mobileNumber, body: "👤 Customer: " ++ customerName ++ "
" ++ "💳 Account: " ++ accountNumber ++ "
" ++ "📱 *Mobile:* " ++ mobileNumber ++ "
" ++ "💰 Balance: ₹" ++ balance ++ "

" ++ "🏦 *Bank:* " ++ bankName ++ "
" }]
